subject: LU-17476 tests: add test for MR match NIDs code

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

I think this is a more direct mechanism to test the changes in lnet_try_match_md() compared to patch https://review.whamcloud.com/53872 "LU-17476 tests: add test for MR match NIDs code" which still only works if there are multiple NIDs configured on the node, and hard-codes the test behavior into the module.

parents.subject: LU-17476 lnet: prefer to use bits only to match ME

commit.subject: LU-17476 tests: add test for MR match NIDs code
commit.message:
LU-17476 tests: add test for MR match NIDs code

Add CFS_FAIL_CHECK() for exercising the match NIDs code.

That is in a hot codepath, but CFS_FAIL_CHECK() is marked unlikely()
and this check is in the error case and _should_ only be hit when the
message would have been dropped anyway, so it seems unlikely to impact
performance in any meaningful way.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3e653c1f00f30037bc4ecad2819a52f03dee9ce6
